data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic link generation at booking confirmation. However, while the linked use case describes the creation of a Zoom meeting link, there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms the link was generated and included in the booking confirmation email for the specific booking instance referenced in the exploratory step. The absence of this critical evidence indicates a gap in the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of the generated link being included in the booking confirmation email.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
